gameDetails.name: Star Wars: The Deckbuilding Game – Mandalorian Faction Pack
gameDetails.description:
Expand your Star Wars: The Deckbuilding Game collection with the Mandalorian Faction Pack! This pack comes with everything you need to add the Mandalorian faction to your copy of the game, including new base cards, starter cards, and cards for the galaxy deck. Also included are special rules and neutral cards that allow you to play an all-new, 3-player, free-for-all variant game mode!

An expansion for Star Wars: The Deckbuilding Game that introduces the Mandalorian faction to the game.
Take command of iconic Mandalorian characters and their unique playstyle focused around attacking enemy cards in the galaxy row and gaining strength while the Force is balanced.
Brand-new 3-player rules—accompanied by some special neutral cards—add a free-for-all mode to the game, allowing you to vie for victory against two other players at once!
Compatible with all of the game’s previous factions, allowing you to mix and match for a custom experience.

—description from the publisher
